description.value:
A tiny spring-loaded crossbow affixed to the wrist or forearm, concealed beneath a sleeve or glove. It fires with a flick of the wrist, ideal for assassins and spies who need a deniable ranged option at close range.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Affixed, Ranged d4 (20/60), Piercing
BasicOne-Handed, Affixed, Ranged d4+1 (20/60), Reload object interaction, Clockwork, Conceal, Hipshot, Keen, Slip
MasterOne-Handed, Affixed, Ranged d4+1 (20/60), Reload object interaction, Clockwork, Conceal, Hipshot, Keen, Slip â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkWhen you miss an attack with this weapon, you may use your reaction to make another attack against the same target.

rmeData.masterPerk: When you miss an attack with this weapon, you may use your reaction to make another attack against the same target.
